intro: Ganyu is a 5-star Cryo Bow DPS and one of the most consistent damage dealers in Genshin Impact. Her Charged Attack Level 2 (Frostflake Arrow) deals massive AoE Cryo damage with zero cooldown, making her top-tier in both Melt and Freeze teams. She excels at ranged combat, overworld sniping, and AoE-heavy Abyss floors. While newer DPS units compete on raw numbers, Ganyu's flexible team options and comfortable playstyle keep her as a top-tier pick for all content.
weapon_bottom_line: Amos' Bow is her signature BiS with up to 52% Charged ATK DMG bonus. Aqua Simulacra and Hunter's Path are close alternatives. For F2P, Prototype Crescent R5 rivals 5-star options if you can hit weak points consistently.

weapons.name: Amos' Bow
weapons.notes: Signature BiS. Passive grants up to 52% Charged ATK DMG bonus at long range. The frostflake bloom also benefits from the passive.

weapons.name: Aqua Simulacra
weapons.notes: Massive CD substat. Low base ATK means Bennett buff is almost mandatory. Passive gives universal 20% DMG bonus.

weapons.name: Hunter's Path
weapons.notes: Tighnari's signature but excellent on Melt Ganyu. Charged ATK DMG scales with EM — ideal for Melt builds stacking EM.

weapons.name: Prototype Crescent R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P option. R5 + weak point hit = 72% ATK buff for 10s. Rivals 5-star options. Requires weak point aiming skill.

weapons.name: Hamayumi R5
weapons.notes: Inazuma craftable. R5 gives 48% Charged ATK DMG at full energy. Good if you can't hit weak points for Prototype Crescent.

artifact_why: Best for Melt Ganyu. 80 EM bonus + 35% Charged ATK DMG. Ganyu's charged shots are her primary damage source, and the EM buff amplifies Melt reactions significantly.
artifact_alt: 4pc Blizzard Strayer — Freeze teams. 40% CR against frozen enemies means you can stack CD to 250%+ without worrying about CR substats.

main_stats.sands_note: ATK% is generally better. EM sands can edge ahead in Melt teams with high ATK buffs (Bennett + Pyro Resonance).
main_stats.goblet_note: Always Cryo DMG. No exception — Ganyu's damage is almost entirely Cryo.
main_stats.circlet_note: CD circlet for Freeze (Blizzard Strayer covers CR). CR or CD for Melt depending on substats — aim for 60:180+ ratio.

sub_priority: 1. CRIT DMG / CRIT Rate — until 60:180+ (Melt) or 30:220+ (Freeze)
3. Elemental Mastery — 200+ for Melt builds only
4. Energy Recharge — 120-130% for comfortable burst uptime

teams.name: Melt Ganyu (Premium)
teams.desc: The classic Melt team. Zhongli's shield lets Ganyu charge shot safely. Bennett buffs ATK, Xiangling applies Pyro. Ganyu's charged shots Melt for 1.5× damage. Best single-target DPS team for Ganyu.

teams.name: Morgana (Freeze)
teams.desc: AoE Freeze comp. Group enemies with Anemo CC, apply Hydro, freeze everything, then Ganyu's burst deals continuous Cryo damage. Devastating against groupable enemies, struggles against bosses.

teams.name: Burn-Melt
teams.desc: Nahida applies consistent Burning (Dendro + Pyro), which maintains Pyro aura for Ganyu to Melt every charged shot. More consistent Pyro application than Xiangling but lower team DPS ceiling.

rotation_code: Zhongli hold E (shield) → Bennett Q (ATK buff) → Xiangling E + Q (Pyro application) → Ganyu E (taunt + dodge) → Charged Shot spam (6-7 shots during Pyronado)
rotation_key: Stay within Bennett's circle and Zhongli's shield. Position so the Ice Lotus taunts enemies away from you. Each charged shot takes ~1.8s — you can fit 6-7 per rotation.
mistakes: Using ATK% goblet instead of Cryo DMG% — Ganyu's damage is almost entirely Cryo. Cryo DMG goblet is always better.
Over-investing in ER — Ganyu's burst is not her primary damage source in Melt teams. 120% ER is sufficient.
Skipping shield in Melt teams — Ganyu gets interrupted easily during charged shots. Zhongli or Layla shield is essential.
Using Blizzard Strayer in Melt teams — 4pc BS gives no benefit when enemies have Pyro aura. Use Wanderer's Troupe or Shimenawa for Melt.

seo.title: Ganyu Build Guide — Best Weapons, Artifacts, Teams | GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Ganyu build guide for Genshin Impact v5.6. Best weapons ranked (Amos' Bow, Prototype Crescent), optimal artifacts (Wanderer's Troupe, Blizzard Strayer), Melt and Freeze team compositions, rotation guide, and common mistakes.
